Sometime before the [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|Destruction of Alderaan]], a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] unit attempted to '''root out''' a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] cell on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bompreil]]. In the skirmish Imperial forces, including the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Daric LaRone]], destroyed an Alliance resistance cell in an operation that resulted in many civilian [[Death/Legends|casualties]].<ref name="Allegiance" />
